title: AI vs. Non AI Job Growth
text:
Hello, World!
Project overview and introduction to the topic of AI vs. Non-AI job growth. This section will provide context and set the stage for the analysis that follows including a literary review of existing research on the topic.

title: Data Preparation
text: Cleaning and preparing data for analysis

title: Predictive Modeling
text: Using machine learning methods to predict job growth trends

title: Skill Gap Analysis
text: Analyzing the skills needed for AI and non-AI jobs

title: Career Plan
text: Planning for AI to take over

title: Exploratory Data Analysis
text: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) is a crucial step in the data analysis process that involves summarizing the main characteristics of a dataset, often using visual methods. The goal of EDA is to gain insights into the data, identify patterns, detect anomalies, and test hypotheses before applying more formal statistical modeling techniques.
